nasb.text: Then Israel said, “It is enough; my son Joseph is still alive. I will go and see him before I die.”

esv.text: And Israel said, “It is enough; Joseph my son is still alive. I will go and see him before I die.”

cnv.text: 以色列說：“夠了！約瑟我的兒子還在；在我還沒有死以前，我要去看看他。”

ccb.text: 以色列说：“我信了！我儿约瑟还活着，我要在死之前去见他。”

csbs.text: 以色列说：“好，我的儿子约瑟还活着！在我死之前，我要去见他。”
